description: This pipeline enhances image contrast using histogram-based normalization methods and then applies a predefined color map to the resulting image, effectively transforming its visual representation without altering the underlying pixel data.

d0441f0b-05a6-4237-8520-ccc11c7d508d.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
d0441f0b-05a6-4237-8520-ccc11c7d508d.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

4da1affe-5241-41c1-805c-894723b6033b.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
4da1affe-5241-41c1-805c-894723b6033b.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.
